column3: A day trip through soaring heights is quite refreshing.
Local areas of fresh water can be a nice place to spend time.
You can spend a whole day enjoying the activities a national park has to offer.
A non-stop drive through the countryside is fulfilling enough.
If you live by the sea, you can take a day trip to an island.
A drive to a historical monument can be educational.
A day trip to the city is pleasant if you live in the country.
